title: Warm Waffled Venezuelan Cassava Galletas
description: Fatty, pillowy Venezuelan cassava cookies steamed in banana leaves, then topped with caramel. Raw-friendly version without steaming.
instructions: Preheat a waffle iron to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together cassava flour and graham cracker crumbs.
Add softened butter to the dry ingredients, then use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into a crumbly mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar, egg, vanilla extract, and milk.
Pour the wet ingredients into the crumbly mixture and stir until combined.
Divide the dough into 4 portions and shape each portion into a ball.
Place each ball of dough onto the waffle iron and cook for 2 minutes.
Once cooked, carefully transfer the waffles to a wire rack to cool slightly.
Drizzle a small amount of caramel sauce onto each waffle, allowing it to set for a few seconds.
Fold the waffles in half and serve immediately.
